mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_balances (account_id, currency, balance) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{currency}, 0)

INSERT INTO deposit_transactions (user_id, account_id, tx_type, amount, currency, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{txType}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{idempotencyKey})
